Дек специально собран как стресс‑пример для редактора: mixed layout, layered cards, inline SVG charts, media wall, table, modal overlay, absolute annotations и разные z-index контексты.

Mini radar
Architecture stress · connectors + absolute nodes

Operational architecture with layered annotations

Connector lines rendered as SVG under cards

Signals Ingest

Webhooks, message queues, CSV imports, streaming telemetry, human escalation inbox.

Decision Engine

Threshold rules, anomaly scoring, incident grouping, policy routing, priority arbitration.

Command Bus

Approvals, rollbacks, deploy holds, patch dispatch, audit-safe replay.

Analyst Workspace

Work queue, reasoning trail, comparison diffs, notes, acknowledgements and runbooks.

Knowledge Layer

Runbooks, policies, architecture docs, exception registry, ownership graph.

Reporting + Recovery

Executive snapshot, SLA postmortem, recovery workflows, export packages, evidence bundle.

z-index = 6
Overlapping note
Useful to test layer selection, bring-to-front and overlap recovery.
inline annotation
Also tests absolute positioning inside a bigger positioned stage.
Media stress · iframe + video + poster + image + notes

object-fit · overlays · aspect ratios

Executive summary
3 red zones
Это окно сделано как поверхностный layer над основным контентом. Подходит для проверки selection conflict, z-index, duplicate/delete и context menu на перекрывающихся объектах.

backdrop-like card
overlapping surface
